case_title: TOMER SANIKIN VS. WICKMAN DEVELOPMENT AND CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-23-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WICKMAN DEVELOPMENT AND CONSTRUCTION
REMARK:PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD AT WINDOW & SUBMITTED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: JONATHAN D WICKMAN) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANIKIN, TOMER AS TO DEFENDANT WICKMAN DEVELOPMENT AND CONSTRUCTION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2022 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,463.00 FILED BY SANIKIN, TOMER AS TO DEFENDANT WICKMAN DEVELOPMENT AND CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED AT WINDOW BY MESSENGER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WICKMAN DEVELOPMENT AND CONSTRUCTION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANIKIN, TOMER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WICKMAN DEVELOPMENT AND CONSTRUCTION $2,960.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,050.00, CAR RENTAL $1160 LOSS INCOME $1800 TOTAL $2960. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-07-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TOMER SANIKIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WICKMAN DEVELOPMENT AND CONSTRUCTION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JONATHAN WICKMAN, CBO, OWNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. THIS CASE HEARD WITH CSM-22-865653. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
